creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #1)
As with bug#283295, this is another -devel port that won't be fixed. Please don't file more PRs based on these outdated -devel ports. Use https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports-kde/tree/kde-it_goes_to_6 as an overlay instead.

> This report 283296 is one of two that I treat as blocking, for example: 

> - <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-doc/pull/423>

Agreed. It would be premature to update the docs with this information at this point. I'm not familiar with the submitter, but he seems legit. Maybe not so familiar with what is going on with FreeBSD, though.
